# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive
  GIT_DEPTH: 0

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

before_script:
  - 'which ssh-agent || ( apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y )'
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY")
  - git config --global url."https://gitlab-ci-token:$CI_JOB_TOKEN@gitlab.example.com/".insteadOf "https://gitlab.example.com/"
  - '[[ -z "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]] && echo "MR title is required" && exit 1 || true'
  - '[[ -z "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" ]] && echo "MR description is required" && exit 1 || true

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

validate_mr:
  stage: validate
  script:
    - echo "Validating MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Validating MR description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - |
      if [[ "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" =~ ^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$ ]]; then
        echo "MR title is valid"
      else
        echo "MR title contains invalid characters"
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      if [[ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" ]]; then
        echo "MR description is present"
      else
        echo "MR description is required"
        exit 1
      fi
  only:
    - merge_requests

build_app:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building application with MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Building with MR description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Building commit message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
    - |
      if [[ -n "$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE" ]]; then
        echo "Commit message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
      else
        echo "Using MR title as commit message"
        git config user.email "ci@company.com"
        git config user.name "CI Pipeline"
        git commit --allow-empty -m "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
  only:
    - merge_requests

test_app:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests for MR: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Test description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - |
      if [[ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" ]]; then
        echo "Running tests with MR description"
      else
        echo "No MR description provided"
      fi
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy_app:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying with MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Deploying with MR description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - |
      if [[ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]]; then
        echo "Creating deployment tag with MR title"
        git tag -a "deploy-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}" -m "Deployed from MR: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        git push origin "deploy-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
      else
        echo "MR title not available for tagging"
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      if [[ -n "$DEPLOYMENT_NOTIFICATION_URL" ]]; then
        curl -X POST "$DEPLOYMENT_NOTIFICATION_URL" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d '{
            "message": "Deployment completed",
            "mr_title": "'"$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"'",
            "mr_description": "'"$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"'",
            "commit": "'"$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"'",
            "timestamp": "'"$CI_TIMESTAMP"'"
          }'
      fi
  environment:
    name: production
    url: $PRODUCTION_URL
  only:
    - merge_requests
  when: on_success

notify_slack:
  stage: notify
  script:
    - |
      if [[ -n "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" ]]; then
        curl -X POST "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" \
          -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
          -d '{
            "text": "Deployment completed for MR: '$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE'",
            "attachments": [
              {
                "color": "good",
                "fields": [
                  {
                    "title": "MR Title",
                    "value": "'"$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"'",
                    "short": true
                  },
                  {
                    "title": "MR Description",
                    "value": "'"$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"'",
                    "short": false
                  },
                  {
                    "title": "Commit",
                    "value": "'"$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"'",
                    "short": true
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }'
      fi
  only:
    - merge_requests
  when: on_success

notify_github:
  stage: notify
  script:
    - |
      if [[ -n "$GITHUB_TOKEN" && -n "$GITHUB_REPO" ]]; then
        curl -X POST "https://api.github.com/repos/$GITHUB_REPO/issues/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_ID/comments" \
          -H "Authorization: token $GITHUB_TOKEN" \
          -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json" \
          -d '{
            "body": "Deployment completed for MR: '$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE'\\n\\nDescription: '$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION'\\n\\nCommit: '$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA'"
          }'
      fi
  only:
    - merge_requests
  when: on_success

release_notes:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [[ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]]; then
        echo "Generating release notes for MR: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        echo "Release notes: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" > release_notes.md
        echo "Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" >> release_notes.md
        echo "Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA" >> release_notes.md
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - release_notes.md
  only:
    - merge_requests
  when: on_success

security_scan:
  stage: validate
  script:
    - echo "Running security scan"
    - |
      if [[ -n "$SECURITY_TOKEN" ]]; then
        echo "Security token provided"
      else
        echo "Security token required"
        exit 1
      fi
  only:
    - merge_requests
